给你一个长度为 `n` 的整数数组 `nums`。

你从下标 0 开始，目标是到达下标 `n - 1`。

在任何下标 `i` 处，你可以执行以下操作之一：

- **移动到相邻格子**：跳到下标 `i + 1` 或 `i - 1`，如果该下标在边界内。
- **质数传送**：如果 `nums[i]` 是一个**质数** `p`，你可以立即跳到任何满足 `nums[j] % p == 0` 的下标 `j` 处，且下标 `j != i` 。

返回到达下标 `n - 1` 所需的 **最少** 跳跃次数。

**质数** 是一个大于 1 的自然数，只有两个因子，1 和它本身。

 

**示例 1:**

**输入:** nums = [1,2,4,6]

**输出:** 2

**解释:**

一个最优的跳跃序列是：

- 从下标 `i = 0` 开始。向相邻下标 1 跳一步。
- 在下标 `i = 1`，`nums[1] = 2` 是一个质数。因此，我们传送到索引 `i = 3`，因为 `nums[3] = 6` 可以被 2 整除。

因此，答案是 2。

**示例 2:**

**输入:** nums = [2,3,4,7,9]

**输出:** 2

**解释:**

一个最优的跳跃序列是：

- 从下标 `i = 0` 开始。向相邻下标 `i = 1` 跳一步。
- 在下标 `i = 1`，`nums[1] = 3` 是一个质数。因此，我们传送到下标 `i = 4`，因为 `nums[4] = 9` 可以被 3 整除。

因此，答案是 2。

**示例 3:**

**输入:** nums = [4,6,5,8]

**输出:** 3

**解释:**

- 由于无法进行传送，我们通过 `0 → 1 → 2 → 3` 移动。因此，答案是 3。

 

**提示:**

- `1 <= n == nums.length <= 105`
- `1 <= nums[i] <= 106`

def solve(nums)
    n = nums.length
    return 0 if n == 0

    max_num = 1_000_000
    # Precompute sieve of Eratosthenes
    sieve = Array.new(max_num + 1, true)
    sieve[0] = sieve[1] = false
    (2..max_num).each do |i|
        if sieve[i]
            (i * i..max_num).step(i) do |j|
                sieve[j] = false
            end
        end
    end

    # Precompute smallest prime factors (spf)
    spf = Array.new(max_num + 1, 0)
    (2..max_num).each do |i|
        if spf[i] == 0
            spf[i] = i
            (i * 2..max_num).step(i) do |j|
                if spf[j] == 0
                    spf[j] = i
                end
            end
        end
    end

    # Preprocess prime_indices
    prime_indices = Hash.new { |h, k| h[k] = [] }
    nums.each_with_index do |num, j|
        if num == 1
            next
        end
        factors = Set.new
        x = num
        while x > 1
            p = spf[x]
            factors.add(p)
            while x % p == 0
                x /= p
            end
        end
        factors.each do |p|
            prime_indices[p] << j
        end
    end

    # BFS
    visited = Array.new(n, -1)
    queue = [0]
    visited[0] = 0
    while queue.any?
        current = queue.shift
        if current == n - 1
            return visited[current]
        end
        # Check adjacent indices
        [current - 1, current + 1].each do |neighbor|
            if neighbor >= 0 && neighbor < n && visited[neighbor] == -1
                visited[neighbor] = visited[current] + 1
                queue << neighbor
            end
        end
        # Check if current is a prime and teleport
        if sieve[nums[current]]
            p = nums[current]
            prime_list = prime_indices[p]
            prime_list.each do |j|
                if j != current && visited[j] == -1
                    visited[j] = visited[current] + 1
                    queue << j
                end
            end
        end
    end
    return -1
end

def solve(nums)
    n = nums.length
    return 0 if n == 0

    max_num = 1_000_000
    # Precompute sieve of Eratosthenes
    sieve = Array.new(max_num + 1, true)
    sieve[0] = sieve[1] = false
    (2..max_num).each do |i|
        if sieve[i]
            (i * i..max_num).step(i) do |j|
                sieve[j] = false
            end
        end
    end

    # Precompute smallest prime factors (spf)
    spf = Array.new(max_num + 1, 0)
    (2..max_num).each do |i|
        if spf[i] == 0
            spf[i] = i
            (i * 2..max_num).step(i) do |j|
                if spf[j] == 0
                    spf[j] = i
                end
            end
        end
    end

    # Preprocess prime_indices
    prime_indices = Hash.new { |h, k| h[k] = [] }
    nums.each_with_index do |num, j|
        if num == 1
            next
        end
        factors = Set.new
        x = num
        while x > 1
            p = spf[x]
            factors.add(p)
            while x % p == 0
                x /= p
            end
        end
        factors.each do |p|
            prime_indices[p] << j
        end
    end

    # BFS
    visited = Array.new(n, -1)
    queue = [0]
    visited[0] = 0
    while queue.any?
        current = queue.shift
        if current == n - 1
            return visited[current]
        end
        # Check adjacent indices
        [current - 1, current + 1].each do |neighbor|
            if neighbor >= 0 && neighbor < n && visited[neighbor] == -1
                visited[neighbor] = visited[current] + 1
                queue << neighbor
            end
        end
        # Check if current is a prime and teleport
        if sieve[nums[current]]
            p = nums[current]
            prime_list = prime_indices[p]
            prime_list.each do |j|
                if j != current && visited[j] == -1
                    visited[j] = visited[current] + 1
                    queue << j
                end
            end
        end
    end
    return -1
end

def solve(nums)
    n = nums.length
    if n == 0
        return 0
    end

    max_num = 1_000_000
    # Precompute sieve of Eratosthenes
    sieve = Array.new(max_num + 1, true)
    sieve[0] = sieve[1] = false
    (2..Math.sqrt(max_num)).each do |i|
        if sieve[i]
            (i*i..max_num).step(i) do |j|
                sieve[j] = false
            end
        end
    end

    # Precompute smallest prime factors (spf)
    spf = Array.new(max_num + 1, 0)
    (2..max_num).each do |i|
        if spf[i] == 0
            spf[i] = i
            (i*2..max_num).step(i) do |j|
                if spf[j] == 0
                    spf[j] = i
                end
            end
        end
    end

    # Preprocess prime_indices
    prime_indices = Hash.new { |h,k| h[k] = [] }
    nums.each_with_index do |num, j|
        if num == 1
            next
        end
        factors = Set.new
        x = num
        while x > 1
            p = spf[x]
            factors.add(p)
            while x % p == 0
                x /= p
            end
        end
        factors.each do |p|
            prime_indices[p] << j
        end
    end

    # BFS
    visited = Array.new(n, -1)
    queue = [0]
    visited[0] = 0
    while queue.any?
        current = queue.shift
        if current == n-1
            return visited[current]
        end
        # Check adjacent
        [current-1, current+1].each do |neighbor|
            if neighbor >=0 && neighbor < n && visited[neighbor] == -1
                visited[neighbor] = visited[current] + 1
                queue << neighbor
            end
        end
        # Check if current is a prime
        if sieve[nums[current]]
            p = nums[current]
            prime_list = prime_indices[p]
            prime_list.each do |j|
                if j != current && visited[j] == -1
                    visited[j] = visited[current] + 1
                    queue << j
                end
            end
        end
    end
    return -1
end

def solve(nums)
    n = nums.length
    return 0 if n == 0

    max_num = 1_000_000
    # Precompute sieve of Eratosthenes
    sieve = Array.new(max_num + 1, true)
    sieve[0] = sieve[1] = false
    (2..max_num).each do |i|
        if sieve[i]
            (i * i..max_num).step(i) do |j|
                sieve[j] = false
            end
        end
    end

    # Precompute smallest prime factors (spf)
    spf = Array.new(max_num + 1, 0)
    (2..max_num).each do |i|
        if spf[i] == 0
            spf[i] = i
            (i * 2..max_num).step(i) do |j|
                if spf[j] == 0
                    spf[j] = i
                end
            end
        end
    end

    # Preprocess prime_indices
    prime_indices = Hash.new { |h, k| h[k] = [] }
    nums.each_with_index do |num, j|
        if num == 1
            next
        end
        factors = Set.new
        x = num
        while x > 1
            p = spf[x]
            factors.add(p)
            while x % p == 0
                x /= p
            end
        end
        factors.each do |p|
            prime_indices[p] << j
        end
    end

    # BFS
    visited = Array.new(n, -1)
    queue = [0]
    visited[0] = 0
    while queue.any?
        current = queue.shift
        if current == n - 1
            return visited[current]
        end
        # Check adjacent indices
        [current - 1, current + 1].each do |neighbor|
            if neighbor >= 0 && neighbor < n && visited[neighbor] == -1
                visited[neighbor] = visited[current] + 1
                queue << neighbor
            end
        end
        # Check if current is a prime and teleport
        if sieve[nums[current]]
            p = nums[current]
            prime_list = prime_indices[p]
            prime_list.each do |j|
                if j != current && visited[j] == -1
                    visited[j] = visited[current] + 1
                    queue << j
                end
            end
        end
    end
    return -1
end

        if sieve[i]
            (i*i..max_num).step(i) do |j|
                sieve[j] = false
            end
        end
    end

    # Precompute smallest prime factors (spf)
    spf = Array.new(max_num + 1, 0)
    (2..max_num).each do |i|
        if spf[i] == 0
            spf[i] = i
            (i*2..max_num).step(i) do |j|
                if spf[j] == 0
                    spf[j] = i
                end
            end
        end
    end

    # Preprocess prime_indices

            factors.add(p)
            while x % p == 0
                x /= p

    visited = Array.new(n, -1)

        if current == n-1
            return visited[current]

                if j != current && visited[j] == -1
                    visited[j] = visited[current] + 1
                    queue << j
                end
            end
        end
    end
    return -1

            while x % p == 0
                x /= p
            end
        end
        factors.each do |p|
            prime_indices[p] << j
        end
    end

    # BFS
    visited = Array.new(n, -1)
    queue = [0]
    visited[0] = 0
    while queue.any?
        current = queue.shift
        if current == n - 1
            return visited[current]
        end
        # Check adjacent indices
        [current - 1, current + 1].each do |neighbor|
            if neighbor >= 0 && neighbor < n && visited[neighbor] == -1
                visited[neighbor] = visited[current] + 1
                queue << neighbor
            end
        end
        # Check if current is a prime and teleport
        if sieve[nums[current]]
            p = nums[current]
            prime_list = prime_indices[p]
            prime_list.each do |j|
                if j != current && visited[j] == -1
                    visited[j] = visited[current] + 1
                    queue << j
                end
            end
        end
    end
    return -1
end
